query.text: declare @partitionPrime varchar(32), @key varchar(512) select @stt_rec_ct = replace(@stt_rec_ct, '''', '''''') select @partitionPrime = 'd91$' + convert(char(6), ngay_ct, 112) from c91$000000 where stt_rec = @stt_rec_ct select @key = 'stt_rec = ''' + @stt_rec_ct + '''' &FilterInitialize; exec FastBusiness$App$Table$Finding @partitionPrime, @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, @key, 'stt_rec + replace(str(line_nbr, 5), '' '', ''0'')', 'rtrim(a.ma_vt) as ma_vt, stt_rec + replace(str(line_nbr, 5), '' '', ''0'') as stt_rec, rtrim(b.ten_vt%l) as ten_vt%l, rtrim(a.dvt) as dvt, a.so_luong, a.sl_duyet', 'left join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt', 'line_nbr', 1, @@userID, 1, default, @$primeJoin, @$primeFilter
